case_title: APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. LOUIS WHITLEY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, LOUIS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT COMPANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, LOUIS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, LOUIS
DECLARATION OF LOST ORIGINAL TEN DAY NOTICE TO QUIT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITLEY, LOUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 9 OSCEOLA LANE, SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $6.03 FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT COMPANY
FILING FEE FOR APPLICATION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT & MANAGEMENT COMPANY SERVED OCT-23-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, LOUIS
WRIT IS POSSESSION AND RETUTNED FULLY SATISFIED
ORDER ON APPLICATION TO VACATE DEFLT JUDGT
